review: The vada pav was perfectly cooked and staff were very polite.
Very slow delivery; momos arrived soggy and cold.
Neither great nor bad, just regular rajma chawal.
Best malai kofta in town, authentic taste and good pricing.
Had to wait forever and the tandoori chicken was bland.
Fair experience, average idli sambar and normal service.
Clean place, friendly team, and excellent pav bhaji.
The naan and curry was undercooked and took too long to arrive.
The veg thali was okay, nothing special.
Amazing experience, especially the fried rice. Will come again.
The biryani was oily and lacked flavor.
The paneer tikka was decent, could be better.
Fast service and very good masala dosa. Highly recommended.
Unhygienic tables and awful butter chicken.
The chole bhature was passable and arrived on time.
Very satisfying meal, the vada pav stood out.
Terrible momos; stale taste and very poor service.
Okay place, the rajma chawal met expectations.
Excellent malai kofta. Portion size was generous and tasty.
Bad experience: cold tandoori chicken and rude staff.
Service was fine and the idli sambar was acceptable.
Great ambiance and delicious pav bhaji. Totally worth it.
Overpriced naan and curry with tiny portion size.
Standard quality veg thali; suitable for a quick meal.
Superb quality of fried rice; arrived hot and well packed.
Worst biryani I have had here, very disappointing.
Mediocre paneer tikka; portion size was fine.
Loved the masala dosa; fresh flavors and great service.
Disappointed with the butter chicken. Not worth the price.
Average chole bhature; decent taste but a bit pricey.
